vocabulary.example: Paris is a popular travel destination.

vocabulary.meaning: điểm xuất phát, nơi khởi hành
vocabulary.example: The flight's origin is Hanoi.
We took the coastal route.
The journey took ten hours.
We had a wonderful trip to Japan.
We joined a city tour.
The hotel offers a day excursion to the islands.
Backpacking is a real adventure.
The mountain scenery is stunning.
The desert landscape is beautiful.
The room has a lovely sea view.
We stopped at a viewpoint to take photos.
The temple is a famous attraction.
The Eiffel Tower is a famous landmark.
We visited an ancient historic site.
Our hotel is in the city center.
We walked around downtown all evening.
We spent a weekend in the countryside.
We stayed in a small fishing village.
We drove along the coast.
We walked along the shore at sunset.
Fishing boats filled the harbor.
The cruise ship left the port.
The waterfall was breathtaking.
We went boating on the lake.
A boat sailed down the river.
We hiked through the forest.
The national park has many wild animals.
We rode camels in the desert.
The green valley stretched for miles.
We climbed a small hill for a better view.
The house sat on top of a cliff.
We explored a huge cave.
The airplane took off on time.
We took the night train.
The bus was crowded.
The subway is fast and cheap.
We took a taxi to the hotel.
We crossed the river by ferry.
They spent a week on a cruise ship.
He toured the country by motorcycle.
We rented a bicycle to explore the town.
We picked up a rental car at the airport.
We arrived at the airport early.
Our flight leaves from Terminal 2.
The plane sped down the runway.
Please go to gate 15.
The boarding gate is closing soon.
The security check took a long time.
We waited in line at passport control.
We went through customs after landing.
Immigration checked our documents.
Our departure was delayed by an hour.
The arrival time is 6 p.m.
Go to the check-in counter to drop your bags.

vocabulary.meaning: bảng thông báo chuyến bay đi
vocabulary.example: Check the departure board for your gate.
My family waited in the arrival hall.
Boarding time is 9:30.
Don't forget your passport.
I need a visa to visit that country.
Show your boarding pass at the gate.
I booked a return ticket.
Our itinerary includes three cities.
I made a reservation at the hotel.
Buy travel insurance before your trip.
You can use your ID card for domestic flights.
Write your name on the luggage tag.
I packed my clothes in a suitcase.
He carried everything in one backpack.
You can bring one carry-on bag on the plane.
We put our big bags in checked baggage.
How much luggage can I bring?
A travel pillow helps me sleep on long flights.
Bring a travel adapter for foreign sockets.
We used a map to find the museum.
The guidebook recommended this restaurant.
I took hundreds of photos with my camera.
My power bank kept my phone charged all day.
Always carry a water bottle when hiking.
Pack a first-aid kit for emergencies.
Take an umbrella in case it rains.
A raincoat is useful in the rainy season.
We stayed at a five-star hotel.
Backpackers often stay in a hostel.
The beach resort has a big pool.
We booked a cozy guesthouse.
Ask at reception for a map.
Leave your key at the front desk.
I booked a single room for one night.
We reserved a double room with a balcony.
They upgraded us to a suite.
We ordered dinner from room service.
The hotel had no vacancy that night.
Show your booking confirmation at check-in.
Hiking in the mountains is my favorite activity.
We went camping by the lake.
Trekking in Nepal was tough but amazing.
We went skiing in the Alps.
Swimming in the sea was refreshing.
We tried snorkeling near the coral reef.
Scuba diving lets you see amazing fish.
Shopping at the local market was fun.
Travel photography is her hobby.
We spent the whole day sightseeing.
She enjoyed sunbathing on the beach.
They went backpacking around Asia.
I love to travel to new places.
The train departs at 8 a.m.
We arrived late at night.
Passengers may now board the plane.
The plane landed safely.
I booked the tickets online.
We reserved a table for dinner.

vocabulary.meaning: làm thủ tục nhận phòng/lên máy bay
vocabulary.example: We checked in at the hotel at noon.
We have to check out by 11 a.m.
I packed my bags the night before.
She unpacked as soon as she arrived.
They had to cancel the trip.
We explored the old town on foot.
We visited three museums.
We wandered through the narrow streets.
We discovered a hidden beach.
We stopped to admire the view.
I just want to relax on the beach.
We experienced the local culture.
The beach was absolutely beautiful.

vocabulary.meaning: ngoạn mục, đẹp đến nghẹt thở
vocabulary.example: The view from the top was breathtaking.
The fireworks were spectacular.
We stayed in a picturesque village.
The countryside is quiet and peaceful.
The beach was very crowded in summer.
The market was busy and noisy.
We wanted a quiet place to relax.
They live in a remote mountain village.
We tried some delicious local food.
Traveling to a foreign country is exciting.
We visited a historic castle.
The ancient ruins were fascinating.
The city has many modern buildings.
We stayed in a luxurious resort.
We found a budget-friendly hostel.
The hotel bed was very comfortable.
It was a memorable holiday.
We had an unforgettable adventure.

collocations.meaning: đi du lịch cùng gia đình

exerciseSets.title: Điền từ vào chỗ trống
exerciseSets.description: Chọn từ vựng phù hợp để hoàn thành câu về du lịch, sân bay và chỗ ở.

exercises.question: Before flying, you must show your ___ at passport control.
I need a ___ to enter that country because I'm a foreigner.
Show your ___ at the gate before you get on the plane.
exercises.explanation: boarding pass = thẻ lên máy bay

exercises.question: We stayed at a beach ___ with a big swimming pool.
The plane will ___ soon, so please fasten your seatbelt.
The pilot ___ the plane smoothly at the airport.
We put our big bags in ___ and kept a small carry-on.
exercises.explanation: checked baggage = hành lý ký gửi

exercises.question: At the airport, we went to the ___ to drop off our suitcases.
exercises.explanation: check-in counter = quầy làm thủ tục

exercises.question: The view from the mountain top was absolutely ___.
We spent the whole day ___, visiting temples and old buildings.
The little fishing ___ by the sea was very quiet and peaceful.
Don't forget to buy travel ___ in case you get sick abroad.
exercises.explanation: travel insurance = bảo hiểm du lịch

exercises.question: We rented a ___ so we could drive around the island.
I booked a ___ room because I was traveling alone.
We have to ___ of the hotel by 11 a.m. tomorrow.
The tour guide showed us a famous ___ — the old clock tower.
We went ___ in the mountains and walked for six hours.
Please check the ___ board to find your gate number.
exercises.explanation: departure board = bảng chuyến bay đi

exercises.question: It might rain, so pack an ___ or a raincoat.
This was an ___ holiday — I'll never forget it.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn nghĩa đúng
exerciseSets.description: Chọn đáp án đúng về nghĩa của từ vựng du lịch.

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'hộ chiếu'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'thác nước'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'khu nghỉ dưỡng'?

options.text: ngoạn mục, đẹp đến nghẹt thở

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'hải quan'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'tàu điện ngầm'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'đi bộ leo núi (trekking)'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'thẻ lên máy bay'?
exercises.explanation: boarding pass = thẻ lên máy bay

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'sạc dự phòng'?

exerciseSets.title: Viết từ tiếng Anh
exerciseSets.description: Dựa vào nghĩa tiếng Việt, viết từ tiếng Anh tương ứng.

exerciseSets.title: Phân loại từ vựng
exerciseSets.description: Chọn đáp án đúng theo nhóm: phương tiện, sân bay, giấy tờ, chỗ ở, hoạt động, động từ, tính từ.

exercises.question: Từ nào là PHƯƠNG TIỆN đi lại?
Từ nào liên quan đến SÂN BAY?
Từ nào là GIẤY TỜ du lịch?
Từ nào là NƠI Ở?
exercises.explanation: hostel = nhà nghỉ giá rẻ (nơi ở).

exercises.question: Từ nào là HOẠT ĐỘNG du lịch?
Từ nào là TÍNH TỪ mô tả cảnh đẹp?
Từ nào KHÔNG phải đồ mang theo khi đi du lịch?
exercises.explanation: runway (đường băng) không phải đồ mang theo.

exercises.question: Từ nào là địa hình TỰ NHIÊN?
exercises.explanation: valley = thung lũng (địa hình tự nhiên).

exercises.question: Từ nào TRÁI nghĩa với 'crowded' (đông đúc)?
exercises.explanation: quiet (yên tĩnh) trái nghĩa với crowded (đông đúc).

exercises.question: Từ nào chỉ hành lý bạn MANG LÊN cabin máy bay?
exercises.explanation: carry-on bag = hành lý xách tay (mang lên cabin).

exercises.question: Nơi nào bạn làm thủ tục khi đến khách sạn?
exercises.explanation: front desk = quầy tiếp tân (ở khách sạn).

exerciseSets.title: Chọn collocation đúng
exerciseSets.description: Chọn từ đi kèm đúng để tạo thành cụm từ tự nhiên về du lịch.

exercises.question: ___ a flight (đặt vé máy bay)
exercises.explanation: book a flight = đặt vé máy bay

exercises.question: ___ a flight (lỡ chuyến bay)
exercises.explanation: miss a flight = lỡ chuyến bay

exercises.question: ___ the plane (lên máy bay)
exercises.explanation: board the plane = lên máy bay

exercises.question: land ___ (hạ cánh an toàn)
exercises.explanation: land safely = hạ cánh an toàn

exercises.question: check ___ online (làm thủ tục trực tuyến)
exercises.explanation: check in online = làm thủ tục trực tuyến

exercises.question: ___ a car (thuê xe ô tô)
exercises.explanation: rent a car = thuê xe ô tô

exercises.question: make a ___ (đặt chỗ trước)
exercises.explanation: make a reservation = đặt chỗ trước

exercises.question: apply for a ___ (xin thị thực)
exercises.explanation: apply for a visa = xin thị thực

exercises.question: go ___ (đi tham quan ngắm cảnh)
exercises.explanation: go sightseeing = đi tham quan ngắm cảnh

exercises.question: travel ___ (đi du lịch gọn nhẹ)
exercises.explanation: travel light = đi du lịch gọn nhẹ

exercises.question: ___ a museum (tham quan bảo tàng)
exercises.explanation: visit a museum = tham quan bảo tàng

exercises.question: enjoy the ___ (thưởng ngoạn phong cảnh)
exercises.explanation: enjoy the scenery = thưởng ngoạn phong cảnh

exerciseSets.title: Giao tiếp — Sân bay & Khách sạn
exerciseSets.description: Chọn hoặc hoàn thành câu giao tiếp thường dùng khi đi du lịch.

exercises.question: Ở quầy check-in: 'Tôi muốn làm thủ tục cho chuyến bay đến Tokyo.'

options.text: I'd like to check in for the flight to Tokyo.
I want check in Tokyo flight.
I check in to Tokyo now.
I like check in flight Tokyo.

exercises.explanation: check in for the flight = làm thủ tục cho chuyến bay

exercises.question: Hỏi 'Chuyến bay của tôi khởi hành từ cổng nào?'

options.text: Which gate does my flight leave from?

exercises.explanation: Which gate does my flight leave from? = Chuyến bay khởi hành từ cổng nào?

exercises.question: Ở khách sạn: 'Tôi có đặt một phòng dưới tên Nam.'

options.text: I have a reservation under the name Nam.
I book a room name Nam.
My reservation name under Nam room.

exercises.explanation: a reservation under the name = đặt phòng dưới tên...

exercises.question: Hỏi 'Khách sạn còn phòng trống không?'
exercises.explanation: Do you have any vacancies? = Còn phòng trống không?

options.text: I'd like to check out, please.
I like to out the room.

exercises.question: Hỏi đường: 'Bảo tàng ở đâu ạ?'

options.text: Excuse me, where is the museum?

exercises.explanation: Where is the museum? = Bảo tàng ở đâu?

exercises.question: Nói 'Tôi bị lỡ chuyến bay.'
exercises.explanation: miss a flight = lỡ chuyến bay

exercises.question: Hỏi 'Chuyến bay khởi hành lúc mấy giờ?'

options.text: What time does the flight depart?

exercises.explanation: What time does the flight depart? = Chuyến bay khởi hành lúc mấy giờ?

exercises.question: Hoàn thành: 'I'd like to ___ a room for two nights.' (đặt)
Hoàn thành: 'Can I see your ___ and boarding pass, please?' (hộ chiếu)
Hoàn thành: 'We're going to ___ the old town this afternoon.' (khám phá)
Hoàn thành: 'The plane will take ___ in ten minutes.' (cất cánh)
